C:\Winlibs\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\TD1_exo1.dir/objects.a
C:\Winlibs\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\TD1_exo1.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\TD1_exo1.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Winlibs\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\TD1_exo1.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\wamp64\www\IMAC\IMAC1\Prog_Algo\S2\ProgAlgo_TD3_Note\bin\Debug\TD1_exo1.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libTD1_exo1.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\TD1_exo1.dir\linkLibs.rsp
